description: Portable automatic data processing machines, weighing not more than 10 kg, consisting of at least a central processing unit, a keyboard and a display
Input or output units, whether or not containing storage units in the same housing
Other parts and accessories of printers, copying machines and facsimile machines
Telephones for cellular networks or for other wireless networks
Other television receivers, whether or not incorporating radio-broadcast receivers or sound or video recording or reproducing apparatus
